description.text: Welcome to 23 Thames Ave - A Charming Brick Ranch on a Peaceful Double Lot! This well-maintained and inviting home offers the perfect blend of comfort, space, and tranquility. Step through the front door into a welcoming foyer that flows seamlessly into the bright and airy living room, highlighted by a vaulted ceiling and abundant natural light. The living room opens to a formal dining area, creating a perfect setting for family meals and gatherings, while maintaining an easy, open flow into the kitchen. The kitchen features quality cabinetry, included appliances, and a cozy eat-in area-perfect for casual mornings and everyday living. Down the hall, you'll find three comfortable bedrooms tucked away from the main living spaces, offering privacy and convenience. A half bath is conveniently located near the main living area, while a full bath serves the bedroom wing. Recent window updates throughout the home add to its overall efficiency and appeal. One of the home's standout features is the delightful enclosed three-season room at the rear-surrounded by floor-to-ceiling windows on three sides and offering direct access to the back patio. It's the perfect spot to relax, entertain, or simply enjoy views of the expansive backyard. The lower level provides additional living space, featuring a massive finished recreation room with a striking sandstone wood-burning fireplace and a wet bar-ideal for hosting gatherings. A second full bathroom, a dedicated laundry area, and an additional storage room add both convenience and functionality. Outside, the deep backyard offers a peaceful retreat with a flowing creek, patio space, and plenty of room for outdoor activities. The 2-car garage includes a rear roller door for easy backyard access, adding even more versatility. This truly lovely home combines charm, space, and thoughtful features-making it a wonderful place to create lasting memories. Don't miss your opportunity to make it yours!

description.text: Charming Ranch with a finished Attic Bonus Space(which is add'l square footage) & Full Finished Basement in Bedford (Unique Opportunity)! Welcome home to this well-maintained and move-in ready 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath ranch offering comfort, functionality, and valuable updates throughout. Nestled in a desirable Bedford location, this home provides the perfect blend of cozy living and flexible space. Step inside to find a bright interior featuring neutral paint, updated lighting, and a spacious eat-in kitchen complete with modern updates and appliances that stay-making move-in a breeze. The updated full bathroom adds a fresh, contemporary touch. One of the standout features is the finished attic bonus room-ideal for a home office, guest space, or additional bedroom. The fully finished basement expands your living area even further, offering a large recreation space perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or creating your dream media room. Enjoy outdoor living with a covered front porch, a rear deck for gatherings with a gazebo and patio, and a fully fenced yard-great for pets or play. The oversized 1-car detached garage provides extra storage and convenience. Major updates include:New gutters (2025),Central air (2021),Roof approximately 10 years old,Furnace approximately 12 years old. With vinyl siding, thoughtful updates throughout, and plenty of flexible living space, this home is a fantastic opportunity for those looking to become homeowners. Don't miss your chance to make this Bedford gem your own!

description.text: ?? Fully Remodeled 3 Bed / 2 Bath Home - Move-In Ready! ?? This beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2-bath home with a 1-car garage has been remodeled top to bottom and is ready for its next owner or tenant. Step inside and you'll find brand-new luxury vinyl flooring throughout, fresh interior paint, updated plugs and switches, modern lighting, and a completely renovated full bathroom-with even more upgrades throughout the home. The spacious living room offers a great showcase area and plenty of room to relax or entertain. Enjoy your mornings on the refreshing front porch, and take advantage of two covered patios-perfect for relaxing or hosting on both levels. ?? Location, Location, Location! Conveniently located near I-480 and I-271, making commuting a breeze. Just minutes from Downtown Bedford and nearby cities, giving you easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment. ? Key Features: 3 Bedrooms / 2 Bathrooms 1-Car Garage Fully remodeled interior Luxury vinyl flooring throughout Updated lighting, electrical fixtures, and finishes Two covered patios + front porch Prime access to major highways ?? Jump into your new way of living-this one won't last!

description.text: Welcome to 109 Forest in Bedford, a beautifully renovated 3 bedroom, 1.5 bath home that blends modern updates with comfortable everyday living. From the moment you walk in, you will notice the fresh finishes, updated flooring, and bright, inviting layout designed to feel like home. The fully updated interior offers spacious bedrooms, an updated full bath plus a convenient half bath, and a functional floor plan that flows effortlessly for both relaxing and entertaining. The renovations give you that move in ready peace of mind, allowing you to focus on settling in instead of adding to your to do list. Whether you are a first time buyer looking for a fresh start or someone ready to upgrade into a home with modern touches, this property checks the boxes. Clean lines, updated systems, and thoughtful improvements make this home stand out in today's market. Opportunities like this do not last long in Bedford. Schedule your private showing today and come see firsthand why 109 Forest should be your next address

description.text: Don't miss this inviting split-level home on a corner lot in Bedford Heights! Offering 3 bedrooms and 2 full baths, this home combines comfortable living spaces, practical updates, and a location convenient to highways, shopping, and more. The main level welcomes you with a bright living room highlighted by a vaulted ceiling and new durable LVP flooring, flowing into the spacious eat-in kitchen with granite countertops, tile backsplash, included appliances, and sliding door access to the backyard. The lower level expands your living options with a generous family room, walk-out access to the backyard, laundry area, and a full bath with a stand-up shower. Upstairs, all three bedrooms feature hardwood flooring, and additional storage space above each closet, while the full hall bath is finished with ceramic tile flooring and a tub/shower surround. Out back, enjoy a large awning and yard space perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. A wonderful opportunity to make this versatile home your own!

description.text: Investor opportunity with long-term tenant since 2018. Current rent is $1,364/month and lease expires 7/31/2026. This Bedford Cape Cod has been completely renovated. The home features 3 bedrooms, 1 full bathroom and offers approximately 1,193 square feet of living space on a lot size of about 9,000 square feet. The living room has hardwood floors and a large picture window allowing plenty of natural sunlight in. Entirely updated kitchen with hardwood floors, built-in cabinets, new refrigerator, new oven/stove, dishwasher, and granite counter tops. Dining room off the kitchen. Two of the three bedrooms are on the first floor as well as the full bathroom. The entire second floor is the master bedroom with a large closet and amazing brickwork on one wall. Other features include a full unfinished basement with washer / dryer hookups, an attached one car garage, and a large front/side yard.
